raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased some XXXX XXXX with the 2-year XXXX coverage ( {$29.00}, price+tax ) as a gift for a relative on XXXX using my XXXX XXXX  store credit card, the order total was over {$290.00} so I got a 12-month promotional 0 % APR. 

I got a text and screenshot from the relative showing that when the XXXX  were added to their XXXX  device, the XXXX  displayed a " Limited Warranty '' and " Eligible to Add XXXX '' even though I already purchased the plan when I ordered it online, so I shouldn't need to purchase again. 

I contacted XXXX customer service through chat on XX/XX/XXXX ( agent XXXX XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX ( agent XXXX  ) to make sure the service plan I purchased was attached to the device. Both agents confirmed that the plan was purchased on the order but was not attached to the device. They recommended I contact the Best Buy XXXX XXXX customer service and provided me with a case number and contract ID for the XXXX.I called on XX/XX/XXXX and got nowhere with the representative, they stated that the person I purchased the XXXX  for would not see the service plan since it was attached to my BestBuy email from the order and I'd need to be present at an XXXX Store with them if they ever needed to put in a claim, it made no sense. 

After the runaround, I filed a dispute with the Best Buy store credit card through Citi on XX/XX/XXXX as my relative purchased the XXXX  through the Settings of their device directly through Apple and I needed a refund. On XX/XX/XXXX I got an email from Best Buy " Action Required by XX/XX/XXXX to Activate XXXX '' where it was acknowledged that there was an issue applying the service to the device when they shipped it and if I didn't provide the IMEI or serial number by XX/XX/XXXX I would automatically get a refund to the payment methods. I replied to that email letting whomever know that I would be awaiting the refund and not following the steps since it had been purchased again directly through XXXX to avoid the headache and further mishap. The toll-free phone number the rep from chat suggested on XXXX did not recognize my SSN or credit card to talk with customer service about the refund.
